$schema: record of migrations applied to the dokploy2 solofame-prod postgres-primary database

applied.method: psql over temporary externalPort=54329; app_user superuser
psql over temporary externalPort=54329; app_user superuser
applied.notes: first apply of 0002 failed with syntax error (CREATE POLICY clause order: TO before FOR). Fix committed in this change — FOR SELECT now precedes TO platform_tenant as Postgres requires. Re-applied cleanly on the same session.

roles.platform_system: NOLOGIN, no BYPASSRLS; system_bypass policies target this role
roles.platform_tenant: NOLOGIN, no BYPASSRLS; tenant_isolation policies target PUBLIC but require app.tenant_id GUC
roles.app_user: login role, superuser w/ BYPASSRLS; member of both platform_* roles

tenantIsolationSmoke.method: two tenants seeded in a BEGIN...ROLLBACK txn; SET LOCAL ROLE platform_tenant + SET LOCAL app.tenant_id
tenantIsolationSmoke.crossTenantInsertBlocked: 42501 row-level security policy violation on tenant_member WITH CHECK

portFlow.firstAttemptWiped: first 0001 apply completed, but Dokploy recreated the container ~10 min later with an empty data volume; data did not persist through that one recreate. Re-applied after container stabilized.
